metadata.title: Unexpected Flank Leads to a Smooth Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how a quick flank and calm aim turn the tide in this tight 2v1. Timing and positioning made all the difference here.
What’s your go-to flank route?
Drop your best clutch plays below!

Share your slickest flank plays in the comments!
